NIKS_SHARED_NPC_INITIATIVE.ToggleTooltip: Enable/Disable shared initiative for NPCs of the same type in this combat.
NIKS_SHARED_NPC_INITIATIVE.ApplyInitiati: Automatically apply the current initiative of other combatants of the same actor type to any new combatant added to the combattracker.
NIKS_SHARED_NPC_INITIATIVE.DebugHint: If enabled, the module will print debug information to the console.
